data.title: Sequoia Group Advances Advisory Capabilities with the First Collaborative Workspace Built for Smarter People Spend Decisions
data.description: Sequoia Group is enhancing collaboration between advisors and clients by introducing Sequoia Pages. Moreover, they have launched the 2026 Total Compensation & Benefits Report to provide data-driven advisory guidance. This initiative, announced in San Francisco on March 24, 2026, aims to strengthen the partnership between advisors and clients.

data.title: Source7 Partners with Top-Tier National Insurance Provider to Revolutionize Residential Risk Profiling
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky, Source7, a leading provider of predictive intelligence for household assets and mechanical systems, has revealed a significant development. The company has entered a groundbreaking strategic partnership with a top-five insurance firm in the United States. This collaboration represents a notable transition in the property and casualty sector, shifting the focus from responding to claims after the fact to utilizing data-driven strategies for risk prevention. As part of this agreement, the insurance provider will incorporate Source7's sophisticated data engine, marking a new era of proactive risk management in the industry.

data.title: ISA's Fourth Annual Industrial Cybersecurity Event Releases Full Program
data.description: In March 24, 2026, the upcoming 2026 ISA OT Cybersecurity Summit in Durham, North Carolina, is expected to feature two breakfast forums, an expo, numerous speaker sessions, and training opportunities. The International Society of Automation (ISA), the primary professional society for automation, will be hosting the event.

data.title: Worthington Enterprises Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Today, the quarterly dividend per share declared by the Board of Directors of Worthington Enterprises is $0.19.
